title: Frenkel Financial Agency — The Private Terminal

surface-2.role: Most-raised elements: flap tiles, avatar plate, nav toggle

line.role: Hairline borders and grid seams — the primary depth cue

ink.role: Primary text and headings on dark surfaces

ink-2.role: Secondary text / body copy on dark surfaces

ink-3.role: Faintest labels: marquee text, hints, quiet values

chrome-1.role: Brightest stop of the chrome gradient (brand mark, primary button)

chrome-2.role: Mid stop of the chrome gradient; cursor-glow highlight color

chrome-3.role: Deepest stop of the chrome gradient

garnet.role: The single saturated accent — nav indicator, hover accents, focus rings

garnet-bright.role: Brighter garnet for hover/active states and the hero pulse dot

paper.role: Background of the single inverted (bright) Schedule section

paper-ink.role: Primary text on the paper section

paper-ink-2.role: Secondary text on the paper section

paper-line.role: Hairline borders on the paper section

display.usage: Hero h1, section h2 headlines, card/stat titles — always solid ink, never gradient-filled

body.usage: Body copy, nav, buttons, form fields, marquee, uppercase labels

shadow-sm.usage: Brand mark plate, contact form panel — small grounding lifts

shadow.usage: Avatar plate, Calendly panel inside .bracket-frame — panels that float above the page

ease.usage: Default easing for reveals, hovers, transforms — ease-out-quint character

ease-snap.usage: Symmetric ease for the split-flap flip rotation

splitFlapRotator.reducedMotion: interval disabled; first word stays static

reveal.transition: opacity .8s var(--ease), transform .8s var(--ease), filter .8s var(--ease)
reveal.noJsDefault: fully visible (gated under html.js so JS-disabled/headless renders show content)

components.name: button-primary
components.description: Chrome-gradient primary action — the only solid chrome fill in the system.

components.name: button-ghost
components.description: Transparent secondary action with a hairline border.

components.name: split-flap-rotator
components.description: Signature hero motif — a mechanical departure-board tile that flips through role-defining words.

components.name: bracket-frame
components.description: Corner-bracket framing device marking a 'worth a second look' element — used on the founder avatar and the Calendly panel.

components.name: hairline-card
components.description: Why-Join grid card — no border/shadow/radius of its own; depth comes from the shared line-colored grid gap.

narrative.northStar: The Private Terminal — a private aviation departures hall at night: graphite and brushed chrome, a split-flap board clattering through destinations, and exactly one warm garnet light cutting through the cool palette.
narrative.overview: A recruiting site for an insurance agency leader, addressed to professionals evaluating a career move. The system dramatizes the agency's pitch (mentorship, momentum, ownership) structurally rather than decoratively: the hero's split-flap tile literally cycles through Mentorship / Momentum / Opportunity / Leadership, corner brackets mark the few elements worth a second look, and a soft chrome cursor-glow drifts across dark sections like light on brushed metal. One section (Schedule a Call) inverts to a bright paper surface as the page's single deliberate destination.
keyCharacteristics: Near-monochrome graphite/chrome base with garnet as the single saturated accent
Bricolage Grotesque (display) + Geist (body/UI) pairing — one expressive voice, one quiet one
Signature motion: split-flap word rotator, corner-bracket framing, cursor-following chrome glow
Hairline borders and shared grid-gaps carry depth instead of shadows
Custom 16-icon line set replaces all emoji, drawn in the chrome brand-mark weight

namedRules.name: The Single Spark Rule
namedRules.rule: Garnet never fills a surface and never appears twice in the same glance without reason — one nav indicator, one hover accent, one focus ring at a time.

namedRules.name: The Hairline Rule
namedRules.rule: Reach for a 1px line/paper-line border or a shared-background grid gap before reaching for a box-shadow. Shadows are reserved for the avatar, Calendly panel, and contact form.

namedRules.name: No Gradient Letters
namedRules.rule: Headings are always a single solid ink/paper-ink color in Bricolage Grotesque. Emphasis comes from weight and scale, never background-clip gradients.

dos: Keep garnet to one purposeful element per view
Use hairline borders and shared grid-gaps for separation
Keep the Why-Join grid as one shared hairline grid of six
Reserve the split-flap rotator and bracket frame as singular, recognizable motifs
Respect prefers-reduced-motion for every animation (flap rotator, cursor glow, reveals, card tilt)
donts: No border-left/right accent stripes on cards, list items, or callouts
No small uppercase tracked kicker above every section
No second bright/light section beyond Schedule
No individually-bordered, shadowed, rounded 'feature cards' in the Why-Join grid
No reuse of the flap-flip animation on other text, or bracket frames on every image
No avoiding garnet 'to be safe' — its rarity is what makes it read as a spark
